/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/psa_switch_test_all.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/psa_switch_test_all.dir/test_internet_checksum.cpp.o CMakeFiles/psa_switch_test_all.dir/test_hash.cpp.o CMakeFiles/psa_switch_test_all.dir/__/thrift/src/PsaSwitch_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/psa_switch_test_all.dir/__/__/__/src/bm_apps/learn.cpp.o -o test_all  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib ../libpsaswitch.a ../../../third_party/gtest/libgtest.a ../../../src/bm_apps/libbmapps.a ../libpsaswitch_thrift.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libxxhash.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpcap.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so.1.9.5 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libboost_program_options.so.1.83.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libnanomsg.so ../../../thrift_src/libruntimestubs.a /usr/local/lib/libthrift.so
